title: Zero-Click Problem Diagnosis

primary_reasons: Position too deep — avg 63.1, most queries beyond page 6
Brand trust low — 5-week-old domain, no backlinks, no brand searches
Core calculators never crawled — 10 main calcs stuck in discovery queue
Title/meta not optimized for click-through — generic 'Free X Calculator' titles
Google showing snippets for informational queries — user gets answer on SERP
Site has 189 indexed but only 24 with impressions — most pages invisible

queries_with_zero_clicks.likely_reason: Title doesn't include the answer ($405.53/month). Competitors may show result directly in snippet. Meta is generic.
queries_with_zero_clicks.fix: Put exact dollar answer in title and meta. Add structured data for loan calculator.

queries_with_zero_clicks.query: how to use retirement income calculator
queries_with_zero_clicks.likely_reason: Guide title is generic 'Free Guide 2026' — doesn't signal 'step-by-step tutorial'. Informational query may have low click intent.
queries_with_zero_clicks.fix: Reframe title as 'Step-by-Step Guide' with practical value proposition. Add numbered steps snippet in meta.

queries_with_zero_clicks.likely_reason: Page is actually a loan calculator, not mortgage calculator — query mismatch. High position but wrong page type.
queries_with_zero_clicks.fix: Page is indexed as loan calc — may need dedicated Nashville mortgage content. Link from mortgage-calculator hub.

queries_with_zero_clicks.likely_reason: URL is formula-looking ($100k-40k-6.5%) which appears auto-generated. Snippet shows formula not human answer.
queries_with_zero_clicks.fix: Rewrite title and meta to be human-readable. Add concrete answer: 'You can afford ~$300K-$400K home.'

queries_with_zero_clicks.likely_reason: Good position (12), but meta doesn't include specific Philly tax rates or 2026 year — looks outdated.
queries_with_zero_clicks.fix: Update meta with '2026 Philadelphia tax rates: 3.75% city wage tax + 3.07% PA state tax. Calculate your take-home pay.'

queries_with_zero_clicks.likely_reason: Informational comparison query — user may want explanation, not necessarily a calculator. Snippet not compelling.
queries_with_zero_clicks.fix: Lead with result: 'Avalanche saves $X more. Snowball pays off first debt Y months faster. Try both methods free.'

systemic_issues: Brand authority: 0 backlinks, domain age <6 months, no brand searches = low CTR at any position
SERP feature cannibalization: Google showing answer boxes, knowledge panels, or featured snippets for finance queries
Title patterns too formulaic: 'Free X Calculator 2026 — No Signup' reads like AI-generated spam
No reviews/testimonials/social proof to build trust in search results
Core calculators not indexed = no chance to rank for high-volume 'mortgage calculator' type queries
Vercel Analytics shows 0 visitors = even test clicks aren't registering
recommendations: Priority 1: Get core calculators indexed (awaiting crawl from manual requests)
Priority 2: Fix top 5 zero-click pages with answer-in-title + compelling meta
Priority 3: Add social proof elements (number of calculations done, user count if available)
Priority 4: Target position 8-11 pages first — smallest gap to page 1
Priority 5: Build at least 1-2 quality backlinks to establish baseline domain authority
